title: Email in Workflow

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I have been using workflows, which has been a wonderful addition to my workspace. Regarding workflows that send emails, it would be nice if the “from” could be designated as someone in a people column. Currently, the only option is to use an email account connected to Monday. But, when I build the automation I want the email to look like it’s coming for the person who is a people column of the item the workflow pertains to. It’s the only way to ensure the item’s owner receives replies.

posts.author: bracharich (Bracha Rich)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes dynamic sending would be very helpful! It seems to be a challenge with integration security but if we can enable integration permissions for automations in the settings to solve that issue, it would be very helpful.
